# AccessoryNotification.DisplayDate.deliveryDate

**Case**

An option to display a date that uses the notification’s delivery timestamp.

## Declaration

```swift
case deliveryDate
```

## Discussion

See [doc://com.apple.accessorynotifications/documentation/AccessoryNotifications/AccessoryNotification/deliveryDate] for the actual date value. Display this date with information that specifies the minute.

## Identifying date display options

- **AccessoryNotification.DisplayDate.allDayDate(_:)**: An option to display a date for all-day events.
- **AccessoryNotification.DisplayDate.contentDate(_:)**: An option to display a date that includes a specific moment to which the notification refers.
- **AccessoryNotification.DisplayDate.hideDate**: An option that indicates the accessory doesn’t display a date.
